productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Unisex Court Evo Brown Shoes
description: The Court Evo from adidas is a lifestyle shoe - a modern, lightweight reinterpretation of the humble sneaker. Crafted from the highest quality materials, the upper features stylish, understated perforation details on the classic 3-Stripes, giving an adidas twist that makes this shoe top our wish-list for the season! Class up your casual act with this stylish sneaker. Recommended for casual wear; looks best when worn with a matching leather jacket.UpperSynthetic upper with stitch detail at the seams of the toe box and fabric inlaysAdidas 3-Stripe embossing at the midfoot region with perforated details on itPadded fabric innerReinforced overlay at the heel collarCentral lace-upsPadded tongue with brandingMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves and a suction point at the big toe region in the outsole Shoe careWipe surface with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
